message:
Fix Worker type: classic worker needed for importScripts()

crypto_worker.js uses importScripts() to load vendor libraries (argon2-wasm,
fflate, sqlite3). Module workers don't support importScripts(), so the
worker must be created as a classic worker (without type: 'module').

This was causing the crypto worker to fail when trying to load dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
